structure.text:
Subject: RE: NCM-P-2025-09-04 Freddie Mac Updates Max LTV on 2-4 Unit Owner Occupied Properties
From: Product Department <ProductDept@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-04 13:47:19-07:00



This announcement is being re-issued with an updated PDF.  The previous email included an attachment that was inaccessible.

 

ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Freddie Mac has announced an update to their maximum LTV ratios for 2-4 unit properties, effective September 29, 2025. This update now aligns Freddie Mac guidance with Fannie Mae. 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Loan to Value increase for 2-4 unit properties 

*	Increasing LTV/TLTV and HTLTV’s to 95% for LPA approved purchase and no cash out transactions for owner occupied transactions. 
*	Manually underwritten and Super Conforming loans are not eligible for this update.  
*	Loan Selling Advisor updates will be available to Seller on Sept. 29, 2025. 

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	LPA will be updated on October 5, 2025. Until then, you may disregard a Feedback Certificate purchase eligibility result of “ineligible” when associated solely with a feedback message in conflict with these updated requirements. 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
